tagline: Fast, fair, around-the-clock towing and roadside help across Jonesboro and Clayton County — our prices can't be beat.
address: Jonesboro, GA · call to confirm location
services_intro: Stranded, stuck, or stalled? We roll out fast with the right truck and a fair price — 24 hours a day, anywhere in the Jonesboro area.
service_1_desc: Fast flatbed and wheel-lift towing for cars, trucks, and SUVs — local and long-distance, day or night.
service_2_desc: Jump starts, lockouts, fuel delivery, and flat-tire changes to get you back on the road quickly.
service_3_desc: Stuck in mud, sand, a ditch, or off the road? Professional winch-out and accident recovery at a fair price.
review_1_quote: Fast flatbed response when my car died late at night — the driver was careful with my vehicle and the price matched the quote. (Representative example — swap in a real Google review on close.)
review_2_quote: Locked out at work and back in the truck quickly — honest, no nickel-and-diming. (Representative example — swap in a real Google review on close.)
review_3_quote: Winched out of a ditch after a storm with no damage and a fair price. (Representative example — swap in a real Google review on close.)
about_paragraph: Tobaz Towing is an established, locally owned and operated towing and wrecker service based in Jonesboro, Georgia, serving drivers throughout Clayton County and the surrounding metro Atlanta area. An FMCSA-registered local towing operation serving the area since 2014, we run 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, because breakdowns and accidents don't keep business hours. From emergency flatbed and wheel-lift towing to jump starts, lockouts, fuel delivery, and winch-out recovery, our drivers show up fast, treat your vehicle with care, and quote you a fair, honest price up front — no surprises. Save our number and call any time, day or night.
